title: timewalk-energy support closure after action bands

split.mode: leave-one-run-out by run with accepted-support event-paired run-block bootstrap

traditional.method: S02/S03 analytic timing plus S04-style atom robust-width lookup after action bands

leakage_checks.note: raw HRDv count gate must pass before closure rows are interpreted
traditional plus ridge, GBT, MLP, 1D-CNN, and phase-conformal gated CNN
pair rows are leave-one-run-out over Sample-II analysis runs
action-band gate must not collapse to a subset of runs
acceptance uses waveform support atoms, not pair residual magnitude or pull

interpretation: After deterministic action-band acceptance, 0.270 of nonduplicated traditional pair rows remain across all held-out runs. The accepted-support winner is phase_conformal_gated_cnn with calibration loss 0.0748; the best ML-minus-traditional calibration-loss delta is -0.1290. The action rule removes the worst support mixtures but does not make the traditional pull model calibrated enough for downstream uncertainty propagation.
next_tickets: S06d: propagate S06c accepted-support timing intervals into PID/range-energy pulls under a fixed abstention budget; expected information gain is whether support-conditioned timing uncertainty improves downstream consumer calibration or merely wins pair-residual diagnostics.
